methodology: Derived from customer KPI pyramids, strategy horizons, and delivery activity using an OKR-inspired structure.

goals.title: 2025-Q3 Stabilize the post-rebrand parking operating core
goals.objective: Keep parking operations commercially credible during the Arrive rebrand by preserving operator trust while converging core controls.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Economic return generated from parking assets after direct operating costs and leakage.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Revenue retained from existing parking operator accounts.

keyResults.target: Protect operator economics during platform transition
keyResults.baseline: Operators were concerned about change during the new corporate-brand rollout
keyResults.statement: Increase net parking yield by keeping pricing, payment, and compliance controls stable while core systems converge.

goals.title: 2025-Q4 Establish a credible open-payment transit operating model
goals.objective: Create enough reliability and rollout discipline that transit authorities see Arrive as an operational partner rather than a risky modernization vendor.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Time required for passengers to board and validate payment.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Recurring revenue from transit payment, devices, and operational services.

keyResults.target: Show that payment modernization does not slow real-world service
keyResults.baseline: Transit buyers were skeptical of operational disruption during rollout
keyResults.statement: Reduce average boarding time by keeping validation fast and failure handling operationally manageable.
